title: BSN registration
description: Step-by-step BSN setup guidance for new arrivals.

body.raw:
## Why BSN matters

You need a BSN for many core systems in the Netherlands.

## What to prepare

Bring ID, address details, and supporting civil-status documents where relevant.

## Appointment flow

Book, confirm, and keep records of submissions and confirmations.
